'''Rohak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a member of the group that founded the village of [[Aurilia]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. He would later become the village elder as well as its spiritual guide. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] he was a very old and wise man for a Human and was once known to direct a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual to other members of the village so that they could receive training in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He was also known to hold at least one [[Force crystal]].

After the reformation of [[Aurilia]] into a township, Rohak remained in the town to provide guidance to the villagers and to travelers who found their way into the town. However, despite leading the village before, [[Paemos]], not Rohak, was given the position as mayor of [[Aurilia]].

==Behind the scenes==
Rohak appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
